metadata.title: Why a coding assistant deliberately refuses to write the 6 lines that matter
metadata.topic: Guided blanks at decision points (learning output style)
metadata.purpose: A SessionStart hook reclassifies "decision points" (algorithm choice, branching logic) as learn-here zones; Claude scaffolds everything around them but leaves the load-bearing lines as guided blanks, so the human forms the mental model precisely where understanding is cheapest to build and most durable.
metadata.clock: narration (Kokoro am_onyx) — master clock; conform each beat to measured audio
metadata.prerequisites: output styles, SessionStart hooks, worked-example effect
metadata.exclusions: the explanatory output style; hook-config syntax; grading whether the human's lines are correct
metadata.visual_object: A code file with boilerplate auto-filled in grey and one highlighted 6-line gap left blank, a prompt beside it.
metadata.hook: A tool built to write code for you stops at the hard part, hands you the keyboard, and waits.

beats.narration_text: Implementing a rate limiter, Claude auto-fills the class, imports, and tests, then leaves the token-bucket refill calculation as a stubbed blank with a comment naming the two approaches — and asks the developer to write those ~6 lines before it continues.
beats.scaffold_note: from Key case — cold open on the concrete instance

beats.narration_text: An assistant optimized to produce code should produce *all* of it; why does withholding exactly the load-bearing lines teach more than delivering them?
A tool built to write code for you stops at the hard part, hands you the keyboard, and waits.

A SessionStart hook reclassifies "decision points" (algorithm choice, branching logic) as learn-here zones; Claude scaffolds everything around them but leaves the load-bearing lines as guided blanks, so the human forms the mental model precisely where understanding is cheapest to build and most durable.
beats.visual: A code file with boilerplate auto-filled in grey and one highlighted 6-line gap left blank, a prompt beside it.
beats.scaffold_note: the resolving mechanism; orbits the visual object

beats.narration_text: 40-line rate limiter; 34 lines grey (auto), 6 lines highlighted blank at the refill math; developer fills them, Claude resumes and adds an insight note.

A SessionStart hook reclassifies "decision points" (algorithm choice, branching logic) as learn-here zones; Claude scaffolds everything around them but leaves the load-bearing lines as guided blanks, so the human forms the mental model precisely where understanding is cheapest to build and most durable.
